positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u37,axiom,
    ranked_highly_by_wta(coco_gauff)).

cnf(u42,axiom,
    ~male(coco_gauff)).

cnf(u48,axiom,
    female(coco_gauff)).

cnf(u33,negated_conjecture,
    ~lost_to(coco_gauff,rafael_nadal)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    iga_swiatek != rafael_nadal).

cnf(u32,axiom,
    at_roland_garros_2022(coco_gauff)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    coco_gauff != iga_swiatek).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    coco_gauff != rafael_nadal).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    lost_to(X0,iga_swiatek) | ~at_roland_garros_2022(X0) | ~female(X0)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~lost_to(X0,iga_swiatek) | ranked_highly_by_wta(X0) | ~at_roland_garros_2022(X0)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    lost_to(X0,rafael_nadal) | ~at_roland_garros_2022(X0) | ~male(X0)).

cnf(u51,axiom,
    ~female(X0) | ~at_roland_garros_2022(X0) | ranked_highly_by_wta(X0)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    ~at_roland_garros_2022(X0) | male(X0) | female(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define active_player(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
